data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — SKILL.md Phase 1 Step 1 uses 'python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright"' for availability check; Phase 2 Step 8 uses 'from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright' with sync_playwright context manager for route crawling.
